chain.thought: Explanation: The athlete from the Czech Republic competed in the Olympic Games in 2008 (10th place) and 2012 (8th place). The best finish was 8th place in 2012.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table lists Olympic Games entries in 2008 (10th place) and 2012 (8th place). Among these, 2012 has the better (higher) finish, as 8th is better than 10th.
